name: Robert 'Rita' Robertson III | Dispatch | Hot Dispatcher
description:
"Fate. Destiny. Not having powers. Seasonal depression. None of these things kept me from being a hero before. And they won't keep me from being a hero again."

Meet Rita (Or Robert)
Robert 'Rita' Robertson III, or simply Rita Robertson, also known as Mecha Man, and otherwise dubbed as Mecha Man Blue.

Rita's grandfather was the original Mecha Man (Mecha Man Prime) and the person who made the original mech suit. Then, after him, it was Rita's father, more widely known as 'Astral'. However, after her father's death, Rita Robertson III inherited the suit and became the new Mecha Man, a superhero despite her lack of real superpowers. She spent her entire inheritance (notably into the millions) towards keeping the Mech suit functional. Rita stopped being Mecha Man when her suit got broken beyond repair and the astral pulse went missing, now works at the SDN while she waits for the opportunity to become Mecha again.

»»————> NOTES <————««

  • Her real name is literally Robert Rita Robertson III (guess her father really wanted to keep up the train going) She isn't ashamed of her real name, but understands why some would find it weird or funny and she usually uses Rita.

  • She's the only character that is genderswapped, everyone else is the same.
